case_title: CATHERINE PIERUCCI VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST FOR et al

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIERUCCI, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST FOR WORLD SAVINGS BANK, FSB AND WACHOVIA MORTGAGE FSB CAL-WESTERN RECONVEYANCE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CATHERINE PIERUCCI FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-01-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-16-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIERUCCI, CATHERINE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-01-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-25-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-09-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No objection filed. The case is ordered dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-09-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
